title: morisonia humilis
intro: Morisonia humilis, also known as the False Pimpernel, is a plant species that belongs to the family Muntingiaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Morisonia humilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
